title: Figure 3 from: Vizzini A, Angelini C, Losi C, Ercole E (2018) Diversity of polypores in the Dominican Republic: Pseudowrightoporia dominicana sp. nov. (Hericiaceae, Russulales). MycoKeys 34: 35-45. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.34.25371

steps.title: Figure 3 Pseudowrightoporia dominicana (JBSD 127410)...
steps.instruction: Figure 3 Pseudowrightoporia dominicana (JBSD 127410) a, b fresh basidiomes in situ c cut side of the basidiome d dextrinoid skeletal hyphae e binding hypha f amyloid spores. Microscopical elements observed in Melzer's anionic reagent. Scale bars: 10 mm (a–c); 10 μm (d–f).
